lessons.title: Illuminators, Lighting, and Composite Viewing
objectives: Specify film-illuminator and background lighting requirements

lessons.title: IQI Placement, Dark Adaptation, and Film Identification
objectives: Verify correct IQI placement on production radiographs
Explain personnel dark adaptation and visual acuity requirements
Confirm film identification requirements are met
cp105Topics: IE 1.5 Personnel dark adaptation and visual acuity

lessons.title: Location Markers, Density Measurement, and Film Artifacts
objectives: Verify location marker placement and coverage
Measure film density at required locations and recognize film artifacts during viewing
